title: The Monkey Bomb
description: Adds in the Monkey bomb from the Call of Duty franchise.
body:
# **Monkey Bombs go Boom!**

![MONKEYS](https://i.imgur.com/ecCTjtt.png)

## **What is the Monkey Bomb?**
The Monkey bomb is a grenade-type item from the Call of Duty games, used to distract zombies and Blow Up.

## **How do I use the Monkey Bomb?**
Right-Click to throw the Monkey Bomb and watch it make music.

## **Where do I get the Monkey Bomb?**
Monkey Bombs can be found from wandering traders, or made with the following items:
 - TNT
 - Leather
 - Wool (Any)
 - Gold Bar

![Recipe](https://i.imgur.com/AMVfeiN.png)
 

## **BOOM Version?**

Do you want to Grief? Then this is the perfect Version. Monkey Bombs now destroy blocks, and sets off nearby TNT.
